reviews.comment:
Algo raro paso con la carga de nafta... Se supone que me cargaron 41 litros pero no llegue a hacer ni 400 kilómetros.. algo muy raro.

Something strange happened with the gas tank... They supposedly put in 41 liters but I didn't even get 400 kilometers... something very strange.
